raw_requirement: Generate application to greet user with proper time like Good Morning, Evening. And ask if he/she want to see Quote of the Day or Joke of the Day. And Reply.
normalised_requirement:
Build a web application that:
1. Detects or accepts the user's local time.
2. Greets the user with the appropriate time-of-day salutation (Good Morning / Good Afternoon / Good Evening / Good Night).
3. Prompts the user to choose between 'Quote of the Day' and 'Joke of the Day'.
4. Fetches and displays the selected content from an appropriate third-party API.
5. Handles API errors gracefully with a retry option.
